title: odontocline laciniata
intro: Odontocline laciniata, also known as toothache plant, is a tropical plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is commonly used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant contains compounds that have been shown to have health benefits, including pain relief, fever reduction, and antimicrobial properties. The leaves of the Odontocline laciniata plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
